name: analytics-dashboard-monorepo
description: Complete Analytics Dashboard with React, Node.js, FastAPI

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:analytics" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:analytics: cd analytics-engine && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:analytics
scripts.install:analytics: cd analytics-engine && python -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
